# 🤝 Contributing

Thanks for your interest in improving the work here. This repository focuses on **generating cleaned-up conjugation data** from Kaikki/Wiktionary JSONL dumps.  

If you want to contribute to the **broader Dynamic Verb Conjugation project** directly, please visit the main repository.

👉 <u>Main repo</u>: **[github.com/DonCiervo/dynamic-verb-conjugation](https://github.com/DonCiervo/dynamic-verb-conjugation)**

---

## How to contribute here

1. **Fork** this repository  
2. **Create a branch** (examples: `fix/spanish-reflexives`, `feat/new-tag-normalizer`)  
3. **Submit a Pull Request**  
4. The **CI will guide you** if any formatting or linting fixes are needed

---

## Bug reports and suggestions

If something breaks or you have an idea for improving the parsing workflow, feel free to:

- Open an **Issue**  
- Or submit a **Pull Request** directly if you already know the fix

---

## Licensing

By contributing, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under:

- **MIT** for all code  
- **CC BY-SA 4.0** for any data derived from Wiktionary
